name: mini-hot-hub
description: 迷你今日热榜 — 微博 / 知乎 / B 站热榜聚合

scripts.dev: concurrently -n client,server -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:client" "npm run dev:server"
scripts.build:server: npm install --prefix server && npm run build --prefix server
scripts.build: npm run build:server && npm run build:client
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
